hero.title: Aylopet: Development Dynamics
hero.subtitle: Watch a vision transform into reality. Join the team defining a new standard for pet longevity.

statusCard.title: Current Ecosystem Snapshot
statusCard.body: A digital demonstration of the future ecosystem. The functionality presented, from AI nutritionist to preventive health calendars, is a prototype of our forthcoming standard. Each idea becomes a refined instrument the moment public interest and shared vision give the project's industrial realization its beginning.

intent.title: Why Pre-Sale Matters
intent.body: For Aylopet, pre-sale is not merely a transaction, it is an expression of trust from you. By earning Honorary Ambassador or Early Bird status, you automatically join the Priority Waitlist. You signal your readiness to be among the first to join our family at official launch. Your engagement is the energy that drives the project forward.

community.title: Shared goal: 500 founding members (Honorary Ambassadors & Early Birds)
community.description: Our aim is to gather 500 enthusiasts who share our philosophy.

stage2.title: Tech Implementation
stage2.body: Full AI integration and algorithm refinement once 500 members are reached.

stage3.title: Industrial Start
stage3.body: Setting up high-tech production lines aligned with international standards.

stage4.title: Logistics & First Delivery
stage4.body: First batch production and exclusive delivery to Priority Waitlist members.

aylopetAi.title: AylopetAI
aylopetAi.lead: AylopetAI is your dog's personal digital nutritionist. It is a specialized artificial intelligence whose knowledge is focused exclusively on canine nutrition. Developed by international-level professional nutritionists, the system allows you to receive a scientifically-backed, individual feeding plan and advice in just 60 seconds. AylopetAI is available 24/7 to safeguard your friend's health.

smartCollar.title: Aylopet Pro
smartCollar.lead: Aylopet Pro is a smart collar designed for real-time dog monitoring, ensuring both safety and activity tracking. The device precisely measures location and distance traveled, allowing us to calculate actual energy expenditure. Based on the data from Aylopet Pro, our AI determines the exact caloric requirements, ensuring your four-legged friend receives exactly what they truly need.

pasteurizedRaw.title: Pasteurized Raw Food: The Evolution of Natural Feeding
pasteurizedRaw.intro: Health starts where nutrition stays alive.
pasteurizedRaw.p1: We believe true vitality comes only from natural, minimally processed food. Aylopet's pasteurized raw nutrition is a revolutionary bridge between wild instinct and modern safety. We created a formula where your four-legged friend no longer has to choose between "natural" and "safe."
pasteurizedRaw.p2: With our low-temperature pasteurization method, we fully eliminate harmful pathogens while preserving vital enzymes, nutrients, and amino acids found only in raw meat. These are exactly the components that are destroyed during high-heat processing (boiling or baking).
pasteurizedRaw.p3: We do not overprocess food; we make it safe. As a result, your companion receives a biologically active diet without additives such as artificial flavorings and taste enhancers, emulsifiers and stabilizers, synthetic preservatives, hidden sugars, and other unnecessary ingredients.
pasteurizedRaw.videoSubtitle: See how we craft safe, living nutrition for your companion.

whyHealthy.title: Why Is Healthy Nutrition Critical?
whyHealthy.intro: Aylopet's philosophy is simple and science-based: balanced, pasteurized raw nutrition (comparable in quality to the best home-prepared diets) is directly linked to a longer, more energetic life. We do not just make food; we build an individualized, evidence-based diet tailored to your dog's unique biological needs.
whyHealthy.evidenceLead: The benefits of healthy, pasteurized raw nutrition are not just theory; they are supported by international research:
whyHealthy.study1Body: A large 2003 study (Lippert & Sapy) based on data from 537 dogs found that dogs fed natural, minimally processed food lived an average of 32 months (almost 3 years) longer than dogs fed industrially processed dry food.
whyHealthy.study2Body: Research from The Farmer's Dog and independent investigators indicates that nutrition based on natural ingredients improves hydration, supports healthier digestion, strengthens immune response, and helps maintain more stable energy levels.
whyHealthy.outro: Aylopet's goal is to bring these scientific advances into your daily routine. With our personalized plan, your companion gets the chance to live not only longer, but better, full of energy and vitality.
